sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ التَّغْذِيَةُ السَّلِيمَةُ حَجَرَ الزَّاوِيَةِ لِلْحِفَاظِ عَلَى الصِّحَّةِ الْعَامَّةِ وَتَجَنُّبِ الْأَمْرَاضِ الْمُزْمِنَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pravilna ishrana se smatra kamenom temeljcem za očuvanje opšteg zdravlja i izbjegavanje hroničnih bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: Proper nutrition is considered the cornerstone for maintaining public health and avoiding chronic diseases.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الْفَرْدِ أَنْ يَتَنَاوَلَ وَجَبَاتٍ مُتَوَازِنَةً تَحْتَوِي عَلَى جَمِيعِ الْعَنَاصِرِ الْغِذَائِيَّةِ الضَّرُورِيَّةِ مِن بْرُوتِينَاتٍ وَأَلْيَافٍ.
sentences.translation: Pojedinac mora konzumirati uravnotežene obroke koji sadrže sve neophodne hranljive materije, poput proteina i vlakana.
sentences.translationEn: An individual must consume balanced meals containing all necessary nutritional elements, such as proteins and fibers.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الْإِفْرَاطَ فِي اسْتِهْلَاكِ السُّكَّرِيَّاتِ وَالدُّهُونِ الْمُشَبَّعَةِ يُؤَدِّي إِلَى مَشَاكِلَ صِحِّيَّةٍ خَطِيرَةٍ مِثْلِ السُّمنَةِ.
sentences.translation: Prekomjerna konzumacija šećera i zasićenih masti dovodi do ozbiljnih zdravstvenih problema poput pretilosti.
sentences.translationEn: Excessive consumption of sugars and saturated fats leads to serious health problems such as obesity.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا يَنْصَحُ الْأَطِبَّاءُ بِشُرْبِ كَمِيَّاتٍ كَافِيَةٍ مِنَ الْمَاءِ لِتَعْزِيزِ عَمَلِيَّةِ التَّمْثِيلِ الْغِذَائِيِّ وَطَرْدِ السُّمُومِ.
sentences.translation: Ljekari takođe savjetuju pijenje dovoljnih količina vode radi poticanja metabolizma i izbacivanja toksina.
sentences.translationEn: Doctors also advise drinking sufficient amounts of water to enhance metabolism and flush out toxins.

sentences.arabic: لَا غِنَى عَنِ اسْتِشَارَةِ أَخِصَّائِيِّ التَّغْذِيَةِ لِتَصْمِيمِ بَرْنَامَجٍ غِذَائِيٍّ يَتَنَاسَبُ مَعَ احْتِيَاجَاتِ الْجِسْمِ الْفَرْدِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Neophodno je konsultovati se sa nutricionistom radi kreiranja programa ishrane koji odgovara individualnim potrebama tijela.
sentences.translationEn: It is indispensable to consult a nutritionist to design a dietary program that suits individual bodily needs.
